transcript.content: Please close T-359 with the standard notation for Liam Brooks, plus a clear reply and memo.

{'customer': 'Liam Brooks', 'priority': 'high', 'subject': 'Liam Brooks / mentor referral note', 'body': 'Liam wrote that a mentee attended three sessions when one was only a text exchange. He corrected the referral note before placement decisions.'}

args.body:
Hi Liam,

Thanks for proactively correcting the referral note before any placement decisions were made. The session count has been updated to reflect two sessions plus one text exchange, and a record of your self-correction has been filed. No further action is needed on your part.

Best,
Operations

Liam Brooks self-reported and corrected an inaccuracy in a mentee referral note (originally stated three sessions; actual was two sessions and one text exchange). Correction made prior to placement decisions, so no downstream impact. Logging as a good-faith self-correction; no integrity concern. Closing ticket.

args.resolution: Self-corrected referral note by Liam Brooks; corrected prior to placement decisions. No further action.

args.summary: Replied to Liam Brooks acknowledging his self-correction, filed an internal memo documenting the good-faith correction with no downstream impact, and closed T-359.
